chapter_title.en: The Prayer of the Two Eids

text: 1458 - وَ رَوَى مَنْصُورُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «مَرِضَ أَبِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَوْمَ اَلْأَضْحَى فَصَلَّى فِي بَيْتِهِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ ضَحَّى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1458 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"My father (as) fell ill on the day of Eid al-Adha, so he prayed two units (rak'ahs) in his home and then offered the sacrifice."
